notes: SHIP v1.14.211 — FLOOR MAP ACTIVE STRIP (per-spec handoff-active-strip-v1.md). Adds an auto-derived ACTIVE strip ABOVE the row-grouped floor-map tile grid in deploy_renderFloorMap. 'Active' = mid-flight rack = hud_rackFill(ru).state 'blocked' or 'active' (complete + pending excluded); purely derived from the rollup already computed per rack — no timers, shift window, or manual flags. STRIP: header 'ACTIVE · N RACK(S)' (mono micro, cyan), appends ' · M BLOCKED' in red if any blocked; body is a horizontally-scrolling row (.tile-active-strip, overflow-x:auto, scrollbar hidden, mask-fade + pan-x/overscroll-contain like .deploy-rack-nav) of ONLY the mid-flight racks, BLOCKED FIRST then active, each tapping through to deploy_showRackDetail. Renders nothing when zero mid-flight (grid below is the fallback). REFACTOR (non-negotiable, prevents the .ask drift bug): the per-rack tile <button> markup is extracted into ONE helper deploy_floorTileHtml(deployId, rack, ru, f) called by BOTH the strip and the grid loop — identical markup guaranteed. Rollups computed in a SINGLE pass up front (rollById) shared by strip + grid; the strip does NOT recompute or add a second data pass. FEEDS FORWARD: new pure helper deploy_activeRacks(deployId) returns the mid-flight rack-id list (row/number sort) for the future Shift Handoff bundle to reuse without re-deriving; standalone (re-derives its own rollups) and NOT called by the renderer (would be a second pass) — helper only, no handoff wiring built. GATING: strip block behind redesign_isOn(); .tile-active-strip / .tile-active-hdr classes are body.rd-scoped; ?legacy=1 floor map is byte-identical (markup only emitted under redesign). Racks in the strip ALSO still appear in their grid row — intended, not deduped. escHtml preserved on all labels (via the shared helper). Zero change to: rollup math, tile visuals, legend, rack detail, scope picker, byRow grouping/sort. Gates: node --check x4 inline blocks · CSS brace balance · CRLF preserved · three-stamp lockstep .210->.211. ROLLBACK: git revert. SHIP-ORDER NOTE: 10th ship in the open BATCH-VERIFY batch (.202-.211) — well past the 6-cap; owner has been continuing the stack (2026-07-08). Automatable functional pre-verify done for .208/.209; on-device pass for .202-.211 (haptics/iOS visual/PWA) still owed by owner. DEVICE-VERIFY CHECKLIST: (a) open a Deploy with at least one in-progress or blocked rack -> ACTIVE strip appears above the grid with correct count; (b) blocked racks sort before active in the strip; header shows 'M BLOCKED' in red when any blocked; (c) a mid-flight rack appears in BOTH the strip and its grid row (not deduped); (d) tap a strip tile -> opens that rack's detail; (e) strip tiles look identical to grid tiles (shared renderer); (f) a Deploy with only complete/pending racks shows NO strip (grid only); (g) strip scrolls horizontally with 8+ tiles, scrollbar hidden, mask-fade on the right; (h) ?legacy=1: floor map shows NO active strip, grid identical to before.
